The phone runs on Qualcomm Snapdragon 1-gigahertz processor and has a whopping 16 gigabytes of storage.
Samsung co-developed the Snapdragon 835 processor with Qualcomm, and as such gets first pick of the fully clocked supply.
Qualcomm is also the leader in cell phone chip sets, led by its high-end Snapdragon chip.
Quad-core Qualcomm SnapDragon S4 Pro features a 40% higher performance rate than the existing quad-core chip.
